Bash(Rscript -e "
library\(httr2\)
library\(stringr\)

url <- 'https://baseball.omyutech.com/ns/omyu_inningscore.js?ver=20240330-1'
resp <- request\(url\) |>
  req_user_agent\('Mozilla/5.0'\) |>
  req_timeout\(15\) |>
  req_perform\(\) |>
  resp_body_string\(\)

hits <- str_extract_all\(resp, 'fetchUrl[^;]{5,150}'\)[[1]]
cat\(paste\(unique\(hits\), collapse='\\n'\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(Rscript -e "
library\(readr\)
df <- read_csv\('C:/Users/toshiki.seto/Box/001_Seto/34_大学野球レーティング/data_out/omyutech_game_results_201906_202111.csv', show_col_types=FALSE\)
cat\('総行数:', nrow\(df\), '\\n'\)
cat\('試合あり:', sum\(is.na\(df\\$note\)\), '\\n'\)
cat\('エラー:', sum\(!is.na\(df\\$note\)\), '\\n'\)
cat\('\\nリーグ別集計:\\n'\)
print\(table\(df\\$cup_title[is.na\(df\\$note\)]\)\)
" 2>&1)
